batch.description: Ultra-filtered lowfat milk with lactase enzyme and vitamin fortification. Built as a Proof of Plate product passport for label-claim verification.
batch.storageInstructions: Keep refrigerated at or below 40 F. Use within 7 days after opening.

ingredients.name: Ultra-filtered lowfat milk
ingredients.source: Proof of Plate Demo Dairy Cooperative
ingredients.description: Lowfat milk concentrated through ultra-filtration to increase protein density while reducing lactose and some sugars.
ingredients.verificationNote: Linked to the ultra-filtration, pasteurization, and lactose-free claims for this batch.

ingredients.name: Lactase enzyme
ingredients.source: Proof of Plate Demo Ingredient Supplier
ingredients.description: Food-grade lactase enzyme used to break lactose into simpler sugars as part of the lactose-free process.
ingredients.verificationNote: Supported by the lactose-free lab result evidence for the finished batch.

ingredients.name: Vitamin A palmitate
ingredients.source: Proof of Plate Demo Nutrient Supplier
ingredients.description: Vitamin A fortificant commonly added to lowfat dairy products to restore vitamin A levels after fat reduction.
ingredients.verificationNote: Included as product formulation information; not represented as a separate verified label claim.

ingredients.name: Vitamin D3
ingredients.source: Proof of Plate Demo Nutrient Supplier
ingredients.description: Vitamin D3 fortificant added to support the product nutrition profile for the demo milk batch.
ingredients.verificationNote: Included as product formulation information; not represented as a separate verified label claim.

claims.label: Feed pesticide declaration available
claims.issuerName: Proof of Plate Demo Feed Supplier
claims.reason: Supplier declaration exists, but no final pesticide residue lab test exists.
